postData.contentHtml:
Thanks for visiting my website! I'm a software engineer at Microsoft and I'm living in Seattle, Washington. I was born in Erie, Pennsylvania and I've spent some time living in State College, Pennsylvania (studying at Penn State University and interning at Penn State University Applied Research Laboratory), and Washington, D.C. (interning at Capital One). I moved to Seattle, Washington in March 2019.

postData.title: About
